message:
test(unit): expand 5 source modules from 29 to 31 inline tests each

consistent_hash.rs: +2 (is_empty, clone independence)
entropy_accounting.rs: +2 (single byte entropy, fill_ratio initial)
segment_tree.rs: +2 (stats counts operations, config default)
interval_tree.rs: +2 (clone independence, query_point boundary)
rope.rs: +2 (clone independence, char_at out of bounds)
